name: Ubiquiti Fail-Secure Strike Lock 15mm
title: Ubiquiti Fail-Secure Strike Lock 15mm
description: The Ubiquiti Fail-Secure Strike Lock 15mm (UACC-Lock-Strike-Secure-15mm) is engineered to deliver reliable security for single doors made of wood or metal. Designed as a fail-secure device, the lock maintains a locked state in the event of power interruptions, ensuring consistent access control and safety. The lock body is constructed from durable zinc alloy, providing resistance against wear and physical tampering. The front plate and latches are crafted from high-quality stainless steel, combining corrosion resistance with mechanical strength. This combination of materials ensures long-term durability in commercial and residential installations. Installation is performed with a door frame recess mount, allowing a flush and tamper-resistant fit that preserves the aesthetics of the door while ensuring secure locking. The lock integrates seamlessly with a UniFi Access Hub, making it an ideal component for centralized access control systems.

detailed_description.heading: Strong Protection
detailed_description.text: With a holding force of 1,200 kg, the lock delivers robust resistance against forced entry. Its compact 15mm strike design makes it compatible with most standard single-door installations without requiring additional modifications. The fail-secure mechanism ensures that doors remain locked even during unexpected power outages, providing reliable security for server rooms, offices, storage areas, and other controlled-access spaces. By focusing on mechanical integrity, material strength, and flush installation, this electric strike lock combines durability with professional-grade security. It offers peace of mind in environments where both physical security and aesthetic integration are critical, providing reliable protection against unauthorized access.

detailed_description.heading: Power & Integration
detailed_description.text:
The Ubiquiti Fail-Secure Strike Lock 15mm (UACC-Lock-Strike-Secure-15mm) features advanced electronic capabilities for precise control and integration into modern access management systems. The lock operates on 12V DC with a ±10% tolerance, drawing 400mA ±10% of current during operation, ensuring reliable performance with minimal power consumption. Door status is monitored via a dry contact system, where DPS/+ and DPS/- indicate an open door when separated and a closed door when shorted. The maximum rating for this monitoring system is 30V DC and 0.1A, allowing accurate integration into centralized monitoring platforms without additional circuitry. Wiring is simplified with two dedicated connections: Lock 12V/NO (red) and Lock 12V/COM (black), streamlining installation and minimizing wiring errors.

The lock integrates directly with the UniFi Access Hub, providing seamless electronic control and reporting of door status within a unified network. Certified under FCC, IC, and CE standards and compliant with NDAA requirements, the strike lock meets strict regulatory requirements for professional installations. Its electronic control and fail-secure operation make it suitable for server rooms, laboratories, offices, and any controlled-access environment where both safety and precise monitoring are essential. With intelligent electronic integration, minimal power consumption, and reliable status reporting, this lock ensures secure, efficient, and easy-to-manage access control for modern buildings and enterprise applications.
